title: First Look: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 Is Giving Me Déjà Vu, and I'm Concerned
summary: At its Unpacked event today, Samsung debuted its latest flagship smartwatch , the Galaxy Watch 9, alongside the premium Galaxy Watch Ultra 2. The Galaxy Watch 8 and Galaxy Watch Ultra use the same Samsung Exynos W1000 as the Galaxy Watch 7.
